criteria.reason: Backend has a scoped refresh jobs service and API endpoint.
Refresh job status normalization and count aggregation are covered by tests.
Operator UI renders refresh history, checks results, shows new reviews, and links to reply generation.
The feature reads existing jobs/results and does not add external writes or publication.
Docs and proof-loop evidence describe the Sprint 36 boundary.

commands_run: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_refresh_result.py tests/test_operator_map_refresh.py tests/test_operator_fresh_reviews.py tests/test_operator_apify_settlement.py tests/test_worker_apify_settlement.py
